structural_claim: Mathematical objects are fundamentally determined by their relational structure rather than their intrinsic properties.

supporting_results.structural_conclusion: Objects are completely determined by their morphisms to all other objects, establishing relational rather than intrinsic characterization
Continuous linear functionals are completely determined by inner product relationships, showing geometric structure emerges from relational properties
Algebraic structures are completely reconstructed from their representation categories, showing objects are determined by how they act relationally
